hero.name: Adam El Bouchiri
hero.tagline: I build modern, performant web experiences end-to-end — from pixel-perfect UI to scalable backends.

about.label: // about
about.title: Building the web, both sides of the stack.
about.p1: I'm a fullstack developer based in Morocco. Over the past two years I've shipped 12 real projects — a year of freelance work alongside my current role at Taahud Corporation, where I've been for the past year.
about.p2: My day-to-day is React on the frontend and Laravel on the backend, glued together with Tailwind, MySQL, and a solid Git workflow. I care about details that ship — accessibility, responsiveness, and the small interactions that make products feel alive.

items.name: Crypto Trading Platform
items.description: A private trading dashboard built for an individual client. Integrates the Binance API for live buy/sell orders and account data, CoinGecko for token pricing, and Binance WebSocket streams for real-time charts. Ships with user settings, full trade history, and a connected trading-bot panel.

items.name: Taahud Backend API
items.description: Backend API powering Taahud — an integrated digital platform connecting contractors, individuals, and engineering offices to manage construction projects end-to-end with smart tools for tracking work, managing resources, and generating reliable reports. I built the full Laravel API with complete CRUD across every HTTP verb (POST, GET, PUT, PATCH, DELETE), role-based dashboards for admins, contractors, and every account type, a supplier store for adding products, a project marketplace where individuals post jobs and service providers apply, plus a full notification system.

items.name: Taahud — Laravel Blade Remake
items.description: Full Laravel Blade remake of the Taahud platform — the same integrated digital platform connecting contractors, individuals, and engineering offices to streamline construction project management, rebuilt as a server-rendered Laravel app. Includes role-based dashboards for admins, contractors, and every account type, a supplier store where vendors add products, a project marketplace where individuals post jobs and service providers apply, a subscription system that gates platform access with payments handled through the Moyasar gateway, plus a full notification system.

items.name: Mini-Coursera LMS (PFE)
items.description: My graduation project for a 6-month fullstack bootcamp — a mini Coursera-style learning platform. Teachers publish lessons made of videos, images, or PDFs and track enrolled students; admins approve new users (who get an email on acceptance) and manage everyone. Premium courses unlock via Stripe payments, and a sequential-progress system blocks learners from jumping ahead until they finish each lesson. A full calendar lists free events, upcoming courses, and the user's own enrolled courses.

items.name: Doctor Banani Dentisterie
items.description: Web app for Dr. Banani's dental practice — React frontend (Vite) and Laravel backend. Patients go through a two-step registration, log in with email/password or Google/Facebook OAuth, book and manage appointments, and pay online through Stripe. Each user has account settings to update avatar, name, and password, plus a full forgot/reset password flow. An admin dashboard manages users and every appointment (view, update, delete). Sanctum-secured API with a notification system.

items.name: Xora
items.description: A modern SaaS landing page built with React and Tailwind — marketing hero, feature sections, pricing, and a fully responsive, pixel-tight UI. A frontend showcase focused on polished product-site styling.

items.name: Mehdi Tahiri
